options.content:
Yokly / Agapay — Alert Report

All tables below are exportable as CSV — hover any table, click the ⋮ menu → Download CSV.
Full machine-readable JSON report: View monitoring_report.json ↗  |  ⬇ Download JSON

panels.title: Firing Alerts — Full Report (exportable CSV / JSON)
Alert Count by Rule Description (Top 20, exportable)
SSH Auth Failures by Source IP (exportable)
SSH Auth Failures by Target User (exportable)
Prometheus Bridge Events by Alert / Severity / Instance (exportable CSV)
True Orphaned GW Accounts
panels.description: GW accounts with no employee record, not a service account, not an authorized admin

panels.title: True Orphaned GW Accounts (not in roster, not service account) — exportable
panels.description: GW accounts with no employee record and not an approved service account. Requires review and possible offboarding.

panels.title: Missing from GW (in roster but no GW account) — exportable
Approved Service Accounts
panels.description: Approved service / shared / system GW accounts

panels.title: Service Acct w/ Admin
panels.description: Approved service accounts that have GW admin privileges

panels.title: Approved Service Accounts — exportable CSV
panels.description: All approved service / shared / system GW accounts. Not counted as orphaned.

panels.title: Service Accounts with Admin Privileges — exportable CSV
panels.description: Approved service accounts that have GW admin privileges. Verify intentional and document if approved.

panels.title: Total Live Shared Drives
panels.description: Shared drives currently returned by the Drive API (excludes deleted).

panels.title: Approved External Drives
panels.description: Shared drives with external members that are in the approved client list.

panels.title: Unapproved External (Violations)
panels.description: Shared drives with external members NOT in the approved list — active violations.

panels.title: Deleted Drives Detected
panels.description: Shared drives that were previously seen but are no longer returned by the Drive API.

panels.title: Deleted Shared Drives — Lifecycle Audit (exportable CSV)
panels.description: Shared drives that were detected as deleted (no longer returned by Drive API). Shows previous category (internal / approved_external / unapproved_external), whether they had external members, and when deletion was first detected.

panels.title: Akvorado — Top 30 Traffic Flows (exportable JSON)
panels.description: Top 30 network flows by max bps from the last 6 hours. Sourced from ClickHouse (default.flows table) via generate-report.py. Fields: Src/Dst AS, Addr, Port, Country, Net Tenant, Net Name, Prefix, Packet Size Bucket, Interface Speed, Max/Avg/P95/Last bps.

options.content:
Akvorado — Top 30 Traffic Flows

Top 30 flows by max bps over the last 6 hours, sourced from ClickHouse default.flows table via Akvorado NetFlow pipeline.

Data source ClickHouse — default.flows (raw NetFlow, 5-min bucketed aggregation)
Time window Last 6 hours
Sort field max_bps (descending)
Fields rank, src_as, src_addr, src_port, src_country, src_net_tenant, src_net_name, src_net_prefix, dst_addr, dst_port, dst_country, dst_net_tenant, dst_net_name, dst_net_prefix, dst_as, packet_size_bucket, in_if_speed, out_if_speed, max_bps, average_bps, p95_bps, last_bps, max_mbps, average_mbps, p95_mbps
Download monitoring_report.json — see .akvorado.top_flows[]

Note: A Grafana table panel requires a ClickHouse or JSON datasource plugin. Install grafana-clickhouse-datasource or yesoreyeram-infinity-datasource to render this as a live table with CSV export.

Export Options

Full monitoring report (JSON) View ↗   ⬇ Download
Grafana — any table panel Hover panel → ⋮ menu → Download CSV
Grafana — this dashboard (JSON) Share → Export → Download JSON
Security Ops Center Open Dashboard ↗

Report auto-regenerates every 5 minutes. All times are UTC. Organization: Yokly / Agapay.

Recording Inventory Downloads

Generated by fathom-inventory-exporter.py on fathom-server.
Synced hourly to monitoring server via deploy script.

  • ⬇ Full Inventory JSON (all meetings)
  • ⬇ Full Inventory CSV
  • ⬇ Issues Only JSON (missing artifacts)
  • ⬇ Issues Only CSV

Files not present until inventory exporter runs and syncs.
